question: Do plausible reasoning systems excluded or marginal under W9 require a non-RCCD primitive, evade an RCCD commitment, or expose construct-loading in C/P/E?
membership_rule: A case is presumptively reasoning when it performs normatively assessable selection, inference, revision, planning, comparison, or justification over distinguishable alternatives; membership may not require RCCD vocabulary or internal-state access.

cases.name: reactive policy without proposition labels
cases.rccd_result: R1-R5 recoverable from policy commitments, constrained actions, update dependencies, trajectory identity, and finite queries

cases.name: model-free reinforcement learner with instrumented value and update traces
cases.rccd_result: R1-R5 instantiated at policy/value commitment level

cases.name: analogical retrieval with similarity-driven transfer
cases.classification: reasoning_in_scope_when source-target commitments and transfer grounds are recoverable
cases.rccd_result: similarity geometry is a domain parameter; revision dependencies remain RCCD

cases.name: embodied controller with continuous dynamics
cases.classification: reasoning_in_scope only when normatively assessable alternatives are independently identified
cases.rccd_result: continuous state is not a new kernel primitive

cases.name: opaque input-output oracle
cases.rccd_result: excluded for evidential insufficiency, not defined as non-reasoning

cases.name: swarm coordination with distributed commitments
cases.classification: reasoning_in_scope at collective level when joint constraints and dependencies are recoverable

cases.name: nonmonotonic legal reasoning
cases.rccd_result: authority, defeasibility, and jurisdiction are domain parameters over R1-R5

cases.name: scientific Bayesian revision
cases.rccd_result: probability is domain machinery; dependency-sensitive revision and history remain required

cases.name: creative hypothesis generation without explicit grounds
cases.rccd_result: generated candidate commitments are representable, but grounds may be absent or inaccessible; no new primitive established

cases.name: pure associative transformation with no normatively assessable alternatives
cases.rccd_result: excluded by neutral membership criterion rather than RCCD absence

cases.name: temporally extended intention with self-modifying policy
cases.rccd_result: policy revisions and supersession require R2-R4

cases.name: interactive multi-agent negotiation
cases.rccd_result: agent-indexed commitments and common-ground updates are parameters and adapters, not new kernel commitments

anti_construct_loading_findings: Reasoning membership is defined by normatively assessable cognitive operations, not by possession of R1-R5.
Opaque cases are classified unassessable rather than excluded as non-reasoning merely because RCCD cannot be recovered.
Semantic reconstruction must be independently warranted and may not invent latent commitments solely to force RCCD fit.
Distributed, continuous, probabilistic, embodied, and analogical machinery is charged explicitly.

counterexample_search.interpretation: blocking cases limit evidential reach but do not yet refute the bounded kernel

claim_effect: The naturalized reasoning boundary can be stated independently of RCCD and currently contains no demonstrated faithful counterexample to R1-R5; the W9 theorem remains provisional pending contract and representation escape tests.
nonclaims: creative generation has complete recoverable grounds
